problem: Find the closest fraction p/q with q < 100 to sqrt(2).
How many positive divisors does 360 have?
Let a_1=1 and a_{n+1}=2a_n+1. Compute a_8.
Let x+y=10 with x,y>0. What is the maximum possible value of xy?
A fair six-sided die is rolled four times. What is the probability that at least one 6 appears?
Find the remainder when 7^2025 is divided by 100.
In triangle ABC, AB=13, AC=14, and BC=15. Find the area of the triangle.
A polynomial P(x) leaves remainder 2 when divided by x-1 and remainder 5 when divided by x-2. What is the remainder when P(x) is divided by (x-1)(x-2)?
How many arrangements of the letters MISSISSIPPI have no two S's adjacent?
Let positive integers a,b satisfy gcd(a,b)=1 and a/b + b/a = 25/12. Find a+b.
Find all real x such that sqrt(x+3)+sqrt(7-x)=4. Report the sum of all solutions.
A 5 by 5 grid is tiled by dominoes after one corner square is removed. Decide whether such a tiling exists.
Let S be the set of integers n from 1 to 1000 such that n is divisible by 3 or 5 but not by 15. Find |S|.
If tan x = 2 and x is acute, compute sin(2x).
Find the smallest positive integer n such that 2^n has last three digits 376.
A sequence has generating function 1/(1-3t+2t^2). If a_0=1, compute a_5.
How many subsets of {1,2,...,10} have sum divisible by 3?
Let r be the inradius of a right triangle with legs 9 and 12. Find r.
Find the coefficient of x^5 in (1+x+x^2)^6.
Suppose f(x)=x^2-4x+7. What is the minimum value of f(x) over all real x?
